Test Description: Verify the login page loads correctly with all UI elements
Prerequisites: Browser open; navigate to Vyaguta URL
Test Steps:
1. Open browser
2. Go to Vyaguta login URL
3. Observe the page layout
Expected Result: Page shows: Leapfrog logo, frog illustration, "Welcome to Vyaguta" heading, and "Continue with Google" button
Comments: Covers UI render of login screen (Image 1)

Test Description: Verify successful login with a valid company Google account
Prerequisites: User has a valid @leapfrog.io Google account
Test Steps:
1. Go to login page
2. Click "Continue with Google"
3. Enter valid company email & password
4. Click Sign In
Expected Result: User is authenticated and redirected to the main dashboard

Test Description: Verify login is rejected for non-company (personal) Gmail accounts
Prerequisites: User has a personal Gmail account
Test Steps:
1. Go to login page
2. Click "Continue with Google"
3. Enter personal Gmail address
4. Click Sign In
Expected Result: Login is denied; error message states only company emails are allowed
Comments: Security check — personal accounts must be blocked

Test Case ID: MODULE 2: Add Employee — Step 1: Primary Info

Test Description: Verify Step 1 (Primary Info) form loads with all required fields visible
Prerequisites: HR/Admin logged in; click "+ Add Employee"
Test Steps:
1. Login as HR or Admin
2. Click "+ Add Employee"
3. Observe Step 1 form fields
Expected Result: Form shows: First, Middle, Last Name; Employee Email; Mobile Phone; Home Phone; Gender; Date of Birth — mandatory fields marked with *
Actual Result: All fields visible and marked correctly

Test Description: Verify clicking Next with all mandatory fields filled advances to Step 2
Prerequisites: Admin is on Step 1 of Create New Employee form
Test Steps:
1. Enter First Name: John
2. Enter Last Name: Jasraj
3. Enter Email: John@leapfrog.io
4. Enter Mobile: 9800000000
5. Select Gender: Male
6. Pick DOB: 1998-01-01
7. Click "Next"
Test Data: Name: John Jasrajji | Email: John@leapfrog.io | Mobile: 9800000000 | Gender: Male | DOB: 1998-01-01
Expected Result: Form moves to Step 2 — Profile Info; progress bar shows Step 2 as active

Test Description: Verify validation error appears when mandatory fields are empty and Next is clicked
Prerequisites: Admin is on Step 1; no fields filled
Test Steps:
1. Leave all fields empty
2. Click "Next"
3. Observe validation messages
Expected Result: Validation errors appear under all mandatory fields; form does not proceed to Step 2
Actual Result: Error messages displayed; form stays on Step 1

Test Description: Verify invalid email format in Employee Email field triggers validation error
Prerequisites: Admin is on Step 1
Test Steps:
1. Fill all other mandatory fields correctly
2. Enter Email: notanemail
3. Click "Next"
Expected Result: Error shown under Email field: "Please enter a valid email address"; form does not proceed

Test Case ID: MODULE 3: Add Employee — Step 2: Profile Info

Test Description: Verify Step 2 (Profile Info) displays all fields including optional and mandatory ones
Prerequisites: Step 1 completed; user is on Step 2
Test Steps:
1. Complete Step 1 and click Next
2. Observe Step 2 fields
Expected Result: Step 2 shows: Permanent Address*, Temporary Address, Blood Group, Marital Status*, Skype ID, GitHub ID, Add Skillset section

Test Description: Verify multiple skills can be selected from the skillset panel
Prerequisites: Admin is on Step 2 — Profile Info
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Javascript" in skill categories
2. Check "Ember JS"
3. Check "Express JS"
4. Verify selected skills appear as tags below
Expected Result: Selected skills appear as removable tags (chips) at the bottom of the skillset section
Actual Result: Ember JS and Express JS shown as tags

Test Description: Verify clicking Previous on Step 2 goes back to Step 1 without losing data
Prerequisites: Admin has filled Step 1 and is now on Step 2
Test Steps:
1. On Step 2, click "Previous"
2. Observe Step 1 fields
Expected Result: User returns to Step 1; all previously entered data is still present in the fields
Actual Result: Step 1 data retained on navigation back

Test Case ID: MODULE 4: Add Employee — Step 3: Official Info

Test Description: Verify Step 3 (Official Info) displays all required fields for employment details
Prerequisites: Steps 1 and 2 completed; user is on Step 3
Test Steps:
1. Complete Steps 1 and 2
2. Arrive at Step 3 — Official Info
3. Observe all fields
Expected Result: Step 3 shows: Employee ID*, Joining Date*, Coach*, Department*, Supervisor*, Designation*, Area*, Status*, Roles, Photo Upload
Actual Result: All fields visible and correctly labeled

Test Description: Verify a role can be selected from the role grid (e.g. Coach)
Prerequisites: Admin is on Step 3 — Official Info
Test Steps:
1. Scroll to the Roles section
2. Click the "Coach" role tile
3. Observe the tile highlight
Expected Result: The Coach tile is highlighted with a blue border indicating selection; other roles remain unselected

Test Description: Verify clicking Finish with all mandatory fields filled creates the employee record
Prerequisites: All three steps have been completed with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Fill all mandatory fields in Step 3
2. Upload a photo (jpg/png)
3. Click "Finish"
Test Data: Employee ID: LF-001 | Joining Date: 2026-05-01 | Dept: DEV | Status: Permanent | Role: Coach
Expected Result: New employee record is created; user is redirected to the Employee List page; new employee appears in the list

Test Description: Verify photo upload accepts only jpg and png file formats
Prerequisites: Admin is on Step 3; reaches Photo Upload section
Test Steps:
1. Click on the Photo Upload area
2. Attempt to upload a .pdf file
3. Observe the system response
Expected Result: System rejects the .pdf file and shows error: "Supported extensions: .jpeg, .png"
Actual Result: PDF rejected with correct error message

Test Case ID: MODULE 5: Leave — Apply Work From Home (WFH)

Test Description: Verify the Apply WFH form loads with all required fields
Prerequisites: Employee is logged in; navigates to Leave > Today's Leave / WFH
Test Steps:
1. Login as Employee
2. Click "Leave" in nav
3. Click "+ Apply WFH"
4. Observe form fields
Expected Result: WFH form shows: Employee*, Date*, Reason*, Task To Do*, Availability*, workload emoji question, Additional Feedback

Test Description: Verify successful WFH submission with all mandatory fields filled
Prerequisites: Employee is on the Apply WFH form
Test Steps:
1. Employee is pre-filled (Richard Gram)
2. Set Date: 2026-05-06
3. Enter Reason: Office closed due to COVID-19
4. Enter Task To Do: Work on sprint tickets
5. Enter Availability: 9-6
6. Select workload emoji
7. Click "Apply"
Test Data: Employee: Richard Gram | Date: 2026-05-06 | Reason: Office closed | Availability: 9-6
Expected Result: WFH request submitted successfully; record appears in WFH Details table with status "Requested"
Actual Result: WFH record created with Requested status

Test Description: Verify submitting WFH form with empty mandatory fields shows validation errors
Prerequisites: Employee is on Apply WFH form
Test Steps:
1. Leave Reason, Task To Do, and Availability blank
2. Click "Apply"
3. Observe validation messages
Test Data: Reason: empty | Task To Do: empty | Availability: empty
Expected Result: Validation errors appear under empty mandatory fields; form is not submitted

Test Description: Verify the workload emoji question is clickable and updates the selection visually
Prerequisites: Employee is on the Apply WFH form
Test Steps:
1. Observe the 4 emoji options
2. Click the "manageable" (slightly sad) emoji
3. Observe which emoji is highlighted
Expected Result: The selected emoji appears highlighted/active; tooltip shows: "It is manageable. I will ask for help if necessary."
Comments: Based on Image 6 — emoji tooltip behavior

Test Description: Verify manager can view a pending WFH request with all employee details
Prerequisites: Manager (Kabir) is logged in; a WFH request from Richard Gram is pending
Test Steps:
1. Login as Manager (Kabir)
2. Go to Leave > Pending Requests
3. Click on Richard Gram's WFH request
4. Observe the WFH Request detail page
Test Data: Employee: Richard Gram | Date: Sep 07, 2020 | Status: Pending
Expected Result: Detail page shows: Employee name, Date, Status (Pending), Availability, WFH Reason, workload emoji, Task To Do, Task Done field, and Approve/Reject buttons

Test Description: Verify manager can approve a pending WFH request
Prerequisites: Manager is viewing a pending WFH request detail page
Test Steps:
1. Open pending WFH request
2. Click "Approve" button
3. Observe status change
Expected Result: Status changes from "Pending" to "Approved" (green dot); record updates in WFH Details table

Test Description: Verify manager can reject a pending WFH request
Prerequisites: Manager is viewing a pending WFH request detail page
Test Steps:
1. Open pending WFH request
2. Click "Reject" button
3. Observe status change
Expected Result: Status changes to "Rejected"; request is removed from the Pending Requests list

Test Description: Verify WFH Details table displays all employees' WFH records with correct columns
Prerequisites: Manager (Kabir) is logged in and on Today's Leave / WFH tab
Test Steps:
1. Login as Manager
2. Navigate to Leave > Today's Leave / WFH
3. Observe the WFH Details table
Expected Result: Table shows columns: Employee, Date, Reason, Availability, Question, Answer (emoji/score), Status; records paginated (e.g. 1-7 of 21)
Actual Result: Table displayed with correct columns and data

Test Description: Verify table pagination works — clicking page 2 loads the next set of records
Prerequisites: Manager is on WFH Details table with 21 records (pages 1 2 3)
Test Steps:
1. Observe current page shows records 1-7 of 21
2. Click page "2" in pagination
3. Observe new records
Expected Result: Records 8-14 are shown; current page indicator updates to "2"

Test Description: Verify table filters records correctly when Fiscal Year is changed
Prerequisites: Manager is on WFH Details table
Test Steps:
1. Click the Fiscal Year dropdown (currently 18/19)
2. Select a different fiscal year
3. Observe the table data
Expected Result: Table refreshes and shows only WFH records from the selected fiscal year
Actual Result: Records filtered correctly by fiscal year

Test Description: Verify the Questions tab shows a list of configured daily WFH questions
Prerequisites: Manager (Kabir) is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Login as Manager
2. Navigate to Leave > Questions tab
3. Observe the Questions list
Expected Result: Questions table shows: Title, Date, End Date columns; all active questions listed (e.g. "How is your work load these days?")

Test Description: Verify admin can create a new WFH question with up to 4 emoji-based answer options
Prerequisites: Admin is on the Questions tab
Test Steps:
1. Click "+ Add Question"
2. Enter Question: "How is your workload?"
3. Add Option 1: emoji + "It is ok"
4. Add Option 2: emoji + "It is manageable"
5. Add Option 3: emoji + "It is excessive"
6. Set Start Date and End Date
7. Click "Save"
Test Data: Question: How is your work load?
Expected Result: New question appears in the questions table with correct title, start date and end date
Comments: Supports emoji based answers up to 4 options
